description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a detachable keyboard and a large, high-resolution touchscreen display. The device features a matte black finish with a minimalist design, and the screen is supported by a sturdy, adjustable kickstand at the back. The keyboard is compact, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a large touchpad below the keys. The rear of the device is plain, with a small camera centered at the top and the kickstand integrated seamlessly into the back panel. The edges of the laptop are thin, and there are minimal visible ports or buttons, emphasizing its sleek and portable nature. The screen is currently on, displaying a Windows operating system interface with various application windows and icons visible.
description: A sleek, black detachable laptop with a touchscreen, integrated kickstand, and compact keyboard, displaying a Windows interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, keyboard, and touchpad, with the Windows desktop interface visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, adjustable kickstand, and the connection between the keyboard and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the integrated kickstand, rear camera, and the plain matte back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the slim design, kickstand, and the alignment of the keyboard with the screen.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows desktop interface with application windows and icons visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad; no numeric keypad is present.
